    Deprecated API

    Contents

    • Methods
    • Deprecated Methods
      Method
      Description
      org.samo_lego.fabrictailor.casts.TailoredPlayer.clearSkin()
      use TailoredPlayer.fabrictailor_clearSkin() instead.
      org.samo_lego.fabrictailor.casts.TailoredPlayer.getLastSkinChange()
      use TailoredPlayer.fabrictailor_getLastSkinChange() instead.
      org.samo_lego.fabrictailor.casts.TailoredPlayer.getSkinId()
      use TailoredPlayer.fabrictailor_getSkinId() instead.
      org.samo_lego.fabrictailor.casts.TailoredPlayer.getSkinSignature()
      use TailoredPlayer.fabrictailor_getSkinSignature() instead.
      org.samo_lego.fabrictailor.casts.TailoredPlayer.getSkinValue()
      use TailoredPlayer.fabrictailor_getSkinValue() instead.
      org.samo_lego.fabrictailor.casts.TailoredPlayer.reloadSkin()
      use TailoredPlayer.fabrictailor_reloadSkin() instead.
      org.samo_lego.fabrictailor.casts.TailoredPlayer.resetLastSkinChange()
      use TailoredPlayer.fabrictailor_resetLastSkinChange() ()} instead.
      org.samo_lego.fabrictailor.casts.TailoredPlayer.setSkin(Property, boolean)
      use TailoredPlayer.fabrictailor_setSkin(Property, boolean) instead.
      org.samo_lego.fabrictailor.casts.TailoredPlayer.setSkin(String, String, boolean)
      use TailoredPlayer.fabrictailor_setSkin(String, String, boolean) instead.
